title: Kadhal Sudgudu Lyrics From Alaipayuthey
stanzas:
Kadhal sudgudu gudu
kannae thodu thodu (3)

alaiye sittraliye
karai vandhu vandhu
pogum alaiye

enai thoduvaai medhuvaai
padarvaai endraal
nuraayai karayum alaye

tholaivil paarthaal
aamaam engindraai
arugil vandhal illai
endraai

nagila nagila nagilaa
o ho vilagida vilagida
nagila nagila nagilaa
o ho vilagida vilagida

pazhagum podhu kumari
aagi ennai velvaai penne
padukkarayil kuzhandhai aagi
ennai kolvaai kannae.

kadhal saugudu gudu
kannae thodu thodu..(4)

neeraaattum nerathil
en annai aagindraai
vaalaattum nerathil
en pillai aagindraai

naanaaga thottaalum
mullaagi pogindraai
neeyaaga thottaalum
poovaaga aagindraai

en kanneer en kanneer
ellaame nee anbae
en inbam en thunbam
ellaame nee anbae

en vazhum en saavum
un kannin asaivilae.

nagila nagila nagilaa
o ho vilagida vilagida
nagila nagila nagilaa
o ho vilagida vilagida

pazhagum podhu kumari
aagi ennai velvaai penne
padukkarayil kuzhandhai aagi
ennai kolvaai kannae.

kadhal saugudu gudu
kannae thodu thodu..(4)

unnullam naan kaana
enaayil podhaadhu
en anbai naan solla
unkaalam podhaadhu

en kadhal vilai enna
un nenju kaanaadhu
aanaalum en muththam
sollamal podhaadhu

kondaalum kondraalum
en sondham nee thaane
nindraalum sendraalum
un sondham naanthanae

un vaetkai pinnaale
en vazhkai valayudhe.

nagila nagila nagilaa
o ho vilagida vilagida
nagila nagila nagilaa
o ho vilagida vilagida

pazhagum podhu kumari
aagi ennai velvaai penne
padukkarayil kuzhandhai aagi
ennai kolvaai kannae.

kadhal saugudu gudu
kannae thodu thodu..(4)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kadhal Sudgudu?

The song explores themes of love and longing, capturing the emotions of a romantic relationship.

In which movie does Kadhal Sudgudu appear?

The song is featured in the movie Alaipayuthey, directed by Mani Ratnam.

Who composed the music for Kadhal Sudgudu?

The music was composed by the legendary AR Rahman.

Who wrote the lyrics for Kadhal Sudgudu?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vairamuthu.

When was the movie Alaipayuthey released?

The movie was released on April 14, 2000.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Alaipayuthey, Kadhal Sudgudu beautifully captures the essence of young love and the complexities of relationships. The song, sung by SPB Charan, is a soothing melody that evokes feelings of romance and longing. AR Rahman's composition, combined with Vairamuthu's poetic lyrics, creates an unforgettable musical experience. The song reflects the emotional journey of the characters, making it a timeless classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kadhal Sudgudu from the iconic film Alaipayuthey. With SPB Charan's soulful voice and AR Rahman's magical composition, this song captures the essence of love and longing. Dive into the poetic world crafted by Vairamuthu and let the music take you on a romantic journey.
stanzaMeanings: Love is bubbling, come and touch me.
The wave comes to the shore and goes back.
If you touch me gently, the wave will dissolve like foam.
From a distance, you say yes, but when close, you say no.
When we get close, you win me over as a young girl. In bed, you capture me like a child.
Love is bubbling, come and touch me.
During bath time, you become my mother. During playtime, you become my child.
When I touch you as myself, you become a thorn. When I touch you as you, you become a flower.
My tears, my happiness, and my sadness are all because of you, my love.
My life and death are in the blink of your eyes.
When we get close, you win me over as a young girl. In bed, you capture me like a child.
Love is bubbling, come and touch me.
I can't see inside you, it's not the right time for me to express my love.
Why doesn't your heart see the value of my love? But my kiss doesn't need words.
Whether you take or leave, you are mine. Whether I stay or go, I am yours.
My life is tangled behind your desires.
When we get close, you win me over as a young girl. In bed, you capture me like a child.
Love is bubbling, come and touch me.
